scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../contracts build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run packages/query/test/query.test.ts packages/query/test/health-tail.test.ts --no-coverage
